items.name_en: CELINE~22s Winter New Arrival|Medium TRIOMPHE FRAME Calfskin Shoulder Bag
items.name_cn:
CELINE~22s Winter New Arrival|Medium TRIOMPHE FRAME Calfskin Shoulder Bag
Newly Online🆕~ This year the logo pushes the minimalist spirit to the extreme, designing a series of hollow Triomphe Frame handbags with more refined and elegant texture, which is heart-melting. The "double hollow" cut elevates elegance💗 The latest handbag adopts a classic flap design, presenting an elegant charm with a simple and upright appearance. The special feature lies in the metal logo position, where the leather is cut along the logo contour, showing a "double hollow" feeling while emphasizing the pattern design. Paired with a metal chain strap and Triomphe Frame, creating a concise fashion taste.
Calfskin, Sheepskin Lining, Crossbody and Shoulder Carry, Magnetic Closure, One Main Compartment, Interior Flat Pocket and Zip Pocket, Front Exterior Flat Pocket, Flap with Shoulder Pad, Sliding Chain Minimum Drop 28 cm and Maximum Drop 50 cm
Dimensions: 23X15.5X5 cm
Code: 2580050

items.name_en: CELINE~22s~New TEEN BESACE TRIOMPHE Embossed Calfskin Handbag
items.name_cn:
CELINE~22s~New TEEN BESACE TRIOMPHE Embossed Calfskin Handbag
The new Teen Besace Triomphe is just too beautiful [Heart]. Unlike the usual square shape, the curved hem adds a touch of softness and a bit of playful cuteness. The capacity is also very good, even a Pro Max fits in~ It looks great with both skirts and formal wear!!
TRIOMPHE Embossed, Calfskin, Sheepskin Lining, Crossbody and Shoulder Carry, Metal TRIOMPHE Closure, 3 Interior Compartments, Interior Zip Pocket and Flat Pocket 16885
Dimensions 18.5 X 16 X 6 cm

items.name_en: CELINE25|TEEN GARANCE Woven Handbag-
items.name_cn:
CELINE25|TEEN GARANCE Woven Handbag-
🆕🆕🆕
Ultra-smooth✨New GARANCE
CELINE's golden 1960s, a must-have patent leather bag🎩
-Just the right amount of sophistication, pure and elegant
-Exquisite black and gold~mysterious and charming, paired with autumn/winter color schemes for a high-end look💯
-New design handle strap~more comfortable and structured than traditional shoulder bags🆙
Sisters who saw the show~should be captivated by it🤩
Woven, sheepskin lining, shoulder and hand carry, TRIOMPHE metal lock, 3 interior compartments, 1 interior zip pocket, 1 interior flat pocket, leather handle length 24cm
Size:18.5x13x6cm
Number:118053

items.name_en: Chan1✔️Vintage original pre-owned CF Black Lamb Skin
items.name_cn:
Chan1✔️Vintage original pre-owned CF Black Lamb Skin
The CF Chanel grandma's heirloom is here! The most classic vintage CF black lamb skin with quilted pattern + gold metal, timeless classic flap
Rich vintage vibe~ really heart-fluttering. Twist lock closure with sliding chain, switch between shoulder and crossbody easily. Perfect size, super versatile for daily wear
Size: 26cm
Number: A2220 Black Lamb Skin

specs.rawTitle:
Chan1✔️Vintage original pre-owned CF Black Lamb Skin

items.name_en: CHANE* 24b Double C logo mini flap, made of polished calfskin quilted, soft, delicate, and elastic. Large Double C logo paired with vintage sand gold hardware, full of personality, a perfect blend of retro and fashion, super eye-catching, looks stylish with any outfit! Simple yet not simple design, looks stunning on. From leather selection to stitching, every detail is carefully crafted, offering high durability and practicality. Whether appearance or inner quality, it withstands the test of time. This Chanel calfskin mini flap is definitely a fashion lover's choice. Made of precious black gold calfskin, delicate and soft, exuding noble temperament, highlighting feminine softness while remaining elegant. Classic large Double C logo makes this bag even more brilliant. Can be carried by hand or worn crossbody, fits a phone and daily essentials, high usage rate, making you look elegant and intellectual. A must-have bag!
